checks.detail: Scheduler fuzz simulation drains without overlapping lock/max-in-flight races.
Unknown/high-risk profiles block behind review gate.
Brokered calls validate requested tool against current tools/list.
Unknown upstream tools require explicit override.
Live probe initializes and lists tools only; it never calls tools.
Remote HTTP session pool carries transportSessionId affinity.
Source snapshot has no enabled upstream MCP servers by default.
